problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
